# SEC Filing Digest

> AI-summarized SEC filing alerts for investors. Monitor financial disclosures by company, form type, and keyword.

SEC Filing Digest monitors new SEC filings matching your watchlist and delivers AI-generated plain-language summaries to your inbox daily or weekly.

## What it does

- Monitors for new SEC filings (8-K, 10-K, 10-Q, 13F, SC 13D, DEF 14A)
- Summarizes each filing in 2-3 investor-focused sentences using AI
- Delivers personalized digest emails based on your company watchlist
- Tracks filings by company (ticker or CIK), form type, and keyword

## Who it's for

- Search fund operators tracking acquisition targets
- Small-fund portfolio managers who need affordable filing monitoring
- Independent analysts and individual investors tracking financial disclosures
- Anyone who needs to stay on top of material SEC filings

## Pricing

- Free: 3 companies, weekly digest
- Pro ($39/month): 25 companies, daily digest, all form types, keyword alerts
- Enterprise: custom pricing, contact sales@zipperdatabrief.com

## Filing types tracked

- 8-K: Current reports (earnings, M&A, leadership changes)
- 10-K: Annual reports (full financial and operational overview)
- 10-Q: Quarterly reports (financials and MD&A)
- 13F: Institutional holdings (what big funds are buying/selling)
- SC 13D: Beneficial ownership (activist positions, >5% stakes)
- DEF 14A: Proxy statements (exec comp, board composition)
